---
title: "Projects"
author: ""
comments: false
citation: false
description: |
  This page showcases a selection of projects that I have worked on, spanning various domains such as data science, machine learning, and software development. Each project includes a brief description, the technologies used, and links to the project website or documentation where applicable. These projects reflect my skills and interests in applying data-driven solutions to real-world problems.
listing:
  contents:
    - "projects/*/index.qmd"
    - "!ar/**"
  
  type: grid
  fields: [title, subtitle, categories, date, image]
  sort: date desc
  filter-ui: true
  image-align: left
  image-height: 100%
format: 
  html: 
    page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
